beats.activity: Wake up, check weather and camera gear, have coffee.
beats.reasoning: Eli wakes early as a habit, especially on days with decent weather. Yesterday's low energy (40/100) suggests he's still settling but the clear forecast energizes him. Morning routine folded into one beat.

beats.activity: Drive to work in Bellevue; transit strike means no Light Rail option, rideshare surge pricing makes personal car sensible.
beats.reasoning: Metro strike until 4pm forces Eli to drive. He's routine-bound and familiar with the I-5/I-405 route; rideshare surge makes his personal car the logical choice. Budget 60 min for cross-town drive during strike disruption.

beats.activity: Work on Q2 analytics pipeline; deep focus on data work.
beats.reasoning: Eli settles into routine work mode, typical morning push through analytics. No meetings noted; he's the type to get absorbed in the numbers.

beats.activity: Lunch at desk or nearby food truck; quick refuel.
beats.reasoning: Eli is a creature of habit with work lunches—sandwich at desk or a quick grab. Knows the food truck rotations and partly cloudy weather makes outdoor eating viable. Keeps it brief.

beats.activity: Continue Q2 analytics work; afternoon push through reports.
beats.reasoning: Afternoon work block. Eli is methodical and gets into flow state on data tasks. Transit strike ends at 4pm but he'll finish this block first.

beats.activity: Drive home to West Seattle; transit strike lifted but driving avoids post-strike surge.
beats.reasoning: Leaves Bellevue around 4pm when Light Rail comes back online, but Eli prefers his routine car commute. 50 min budget for cross-town drive with post-work traffic clearing.

beats.activity: Stop at Safeway to pick up supplies for food bank volunteer shift.
beats.reasoning: Eli has a pattern of stopping at Safeway on the way home, especially when volunteering at the food bank is on his mind. Partly cloudy day means no weather resistance; he can make a quick stock run.

beats.activity: Quick walk home and put groceries away; settle in.
beats.reasoning: Short walk from Safeway to home to unload groceries and decompress. Transition into evening mode.

beats.activity: Prepare and eat dinner; quiet evening meal at home.
beats.reasoning: Eli values quiet time at home after work. He'll cook or assemble something simple, consistent with his routine-bound nature and preference for solitude over crowds.

world_event_prompt: Mild, partly cloudy Thursday, high of 68F. Citywide transit strike: all Metro buses and Link Light Rail suspended until 4pm. Rideshare surge pricing in effect.
